ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "number_of_states" INTEGER /* Number of states in the simulation */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate used in the simulation */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the simulation */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., weakest) */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of interactions */,
  "sender_convex" REAL /* Convexity of sender interactions */,
  "meta_step" INTEGER /* Meta-step of the simulation */,
  "impairment" REAL /* Impairment or anomaly during the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convergence_status" (
  "convergence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convergence status entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "receiver_entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the receiver component */,
  "sender_entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the sender component */,
  "receiver_converged" INTEGER /* Convergence status of the receiver component */,
  "sender_converged" INTEGER /* Convergence status of the sender component */,
  "receiver_euclidean_distance" REAL /* Euclidean distance of the receiver component */,
  "sender_euclidean_distance" REAL /* Euclidean distance of the sender component */,
  "sender_convexity" REAL /* Convexity of the sender component */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration at which the convergence status was recorded */,
  "convergence_time" REAL /* Time taken for convergence */,
  "convergence_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for convergence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convergence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_convergence_status_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_metrics" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction metric entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., weakest) */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of interactions */,
  "sender_convex" REAL /* Convexity of sender interactions */,
  "meta_step" INTEGER /* Meta-step of the simulation */,
  "impairment" REAL /* Impairment or anomaly during the simulation */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration at which the interaction metrics were recorded */,
  "interaction_time" REAL /* Time taken for the interaction */,
  "interaction_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "number_of_states" INTEGER /* Number of states in the simulation */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate used in the simulation */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the simulation */,
  "meta_step" INTEGER /* Meta-step of the simulation */,
  "parameter_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter set */,
  "parameter_set_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the parameter set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
